description: arXiv:2607.16266v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Existing approaches for reasoning about action and change provide expressive semantics for modeling dynamic systems, in most cases built on top of logic programming systems. We introduce a modular framework for transition and trajectory verification based on Tiles and implemented in Soda, which is an efficient functional programming language. Th...
